case_title: VOGT, DENNIS DBA UNIVERSAL WEATHER STRIP CO VS. MORGAN THOMAS

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MORGAN THOMAS SET FOR MAY-30-2008 IS CONTINUED TO JUL-18-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 PER REQUEST OF THE PARTIES. SETTLEMENT PENDING. IF NO APPEARANCES, COURT WILL GRANT MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT, AND DISMISS CLAIM WITH PREJUDICE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VOGT, DENNIS DBA UNIVERSAL WEATHER STRIP CO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THOMAS, MORGAN $2,102.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,152.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MORGAN THOMAS SET FOR JUL-18-2008 IS CONTINUED TO AUG-15-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN 506. SETTLEMENT PENDING. IF NO APPEARANCES, COURT WILL GRANT MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT, AND DISMISS CLAIM WITH PREJUDICE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MORGAN THOMAS IS GRANTED. PER JUL-18-08 SMALL CLAIMS ORDER CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCE BY PARTIES ON AUG-15-08. (CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (CASE SETTLED)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,102.00 FILED BY VOGT, DENNIS DBA UNIVERSAL WEATHER STRIP CO AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, MORGAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-25-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-03-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT THOMAS, MORGAN
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT THOMAS, MORGAN HEARING SET FOR MAY-30-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
